utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Each must be fully specified with details as indicated (details, price, terms, costs, etc.). The final property solution includes all six items, each with sufficient detail: (1) property has address, type, features, price, and viewing date; (2) financing includes type, source, preferred closing, and move-in dates; (3) legal_services lists provider and cost estimates; (4) moving_services includes provider and cost estimates; (5) setup_services includes utilities, cost range, and notes; (6) total_budget includes breakdown of property price, legal/fees, moving, utilities, and total estimated cost. All required items are fully covered and sufficiently detailed.
